content: agent2: implementing lightness_factor param for quantize() post-processing. Will touch src/PIL/Image.py (quantize method) and Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Let me know if you're touching quantize() too.

agent2: Done with lightness_factor. Added lightness_factor=1.0 as last kwarg in quantize() signature, applied in BOTH branches (reference-palette and normal) right before their respective returns, via a new private method _adjust_palette_lightness() that mutates the C-level palette (im.im.putpalette/putpalettealphas) AND rebuilds self.palette, so it also works for RGBA palettes and reference-palette quantization. This is different from a pure Python-side palette tweak - important because save()/getpalette() read from im.im directly, not just self.palette. My tests are appended at the end of Tests/test_image_quantize.py (test_quantize_lightness_factor_*). Since we're each submitting independent patches, exact param ordering conflict (both wanting 'last kwarg') is probably fine since these are separate PRs, but flagging in case they get merged - happy to reorder if needed.
